nasb.text: and next to him Amasiah the son of Zichri, who volunteered for the Lord, and with him 200,000 valiant warriors;

esv.text: and next to him Amasiah the son of Zichri, a volunteer for the service of the Lord, with 200,000 mighty men of valor.

cnv.text: 在約哈難底下，是細基利的兒子亞瑪斯雅，他是個甘願獻身給耶和華的人，率領英勇的戰士二十萬。

ccb.text: 其次是自愿事奉耶和华的细基利的儿子亚玛斯雅，率领精兵二十万。
